homepages.title-des: Answer 12 simple questions and get personalized recommendations for your technology university major!
homepages.body-text: Your jouney to a dream major in 3 simple steps
homepages.body-text-1: Quick and easy interest assessment designed to understand your strengths and compatibilities.
homepages.body-text-2: Mathematical computation matches for technology majors that fit your profile perfectly.
homepages.body-text-3: Select a major and receives all local universities in Cambodia that offer your selected major.
homepages.body-text-4: Hear from students who found their path with Sakol Life

sophea-chan.name: Sophea Chan
sophea-chan.text: I was confused about which major to pick, and the quiz questions were spot on! I'm now studying Computer Science.

sereitepy-or.name: Sereitepy Or
sereitepy-or.text: The university information were really helpful! Highly recommended!

bpha-ly.name: Bopha Ly
bpha-ly.text: Sakol Life helped me realized that my hobby could be a career. And the start of that career is a perfect fit tech.

about.title-des: Sakol Life is a dedicated platform designed to bridge the gap between high school and higher education for Cambodian students. We focus on tech-driven majors to align with national STEM development goals.
about.body-text: We have built the tools you need to make the biggest decision of your academic life easier, smarter, and way more fun.
about.body-text-1: Our system analyzes your personality and passions to suggest tech majors you will actually love.
about.subheading2: University Insights. All in One Place
about.title-built-des: We know exactly how it feels to stand where you are. The confusion, the overwhelming choices, and the pressure of the future.
about.body-text-2: Tailored info for students in both urban and rural areas.
about.meet-des: We are a group of MIS students, passionate about bridging the gap between high school and a successful tech university decision.

major-tab.based: Based on your matching profile results, we found

major-tab.no: No Majors Match Your Current Filters

dashboard_assessment.title: Current Assessment Status
dashboard_assessment.desc_complete: Your professional skills match assessment has been completed.
dashboard_assessment.desc_empty: Please take the assessment quiz to unlock your personalized major recommendations.

dashboard_recommendations.title: My Recommendations
dashboard_recommendations.saved_results_desc: Your results are saved, view them below.
dashboard_recommendations.empty_quiz_desc: Take the quiz to get personalized major recommendations.

Q1.label: New app/phone behaviour
Q1.A: I set it up myself and explore all the settings on my own
Q1.B: I watch a YouTube tutorial or read instructions to figure it out
Q1.C: I ask a friend or family member to help me set it up
Q1.D: I just use it for the basics without exploring much

Q2.label: Content you stop and watch
Q2.A: Satisfying video edits, cool transitions, or visually beautiful content
Q2.B: Interesting facts, news, or "did you know" type videos
Q2.C: Business pages, brand stories, or people building their following
Q2.D: Tutorials showing how to fix or build something
Q2.E: Funny memes or entertainment with no particular theme

Q3.label: Digital content creation
Q3.A: Yes, I do it often and genuinely enjoy making things look good
Q3.B: Yes, but mainly just to get something done, not because I love it
Q3.C: I have tried once or twice but it didn't really interest me

Q4.label: Troubleshooting approach
Q4.A: I try to fix it myself, restart, clear cache, Google the problem, test things
Q4.B: I look for a YouTube video or forum that explains the fix
Q4.C: I hand it to someone else to deal with
Q4.D: I wait and hope it fixes itself

Q7.label: How you use your phone
Q7.A: I customize everything: wallpapers, widgets, fonts, until it looks exactly right
Q7.B: I use it to learn things: podcasts, articles, YouTube rabbit holes
Q7.C: I am always in group chats, helping people, or organizing things for others
Q7.D: I follow business or side-hustle pages, or I am already trying to sell something
Q7.E: I like knowing how things work — I have searched things like "how does WiFi actually work"
Q7.F: I keep notes, to-do lists, or manage files and schedules on my phone

Q9.label: What you would build with tech
Q9.A: An app or game that people download and use every day
Q9.B: A tool that looks amazing and is incredibly easy to use
Q9.C: A system that analyzes data and gives smart recommendations to people
Q9.D: A security system that protects accounts and keeps private data safe
Q9.E: An online store or brand that earns real money
Q9.F: A platform that connects people and helps communities work together
Q9.G: An AI system that learns from data and gets smarter over time
Q9.H: A network or infrastructure that keeps important systems running reliably

Q10.label: Most meaningful accomplishment
Q10.A: Writing code that actually works and does something useful for people
Q10.B: Designing something so clean and beautiful that everyone asks who made it
Q10.C: Finding a pattern in a messy dataset that nobody else noticed
Q10.D: Being the person who stopped a scam or prevented a data breach
Q10.E: Growing a page or brand from zero to thousands of followers or customers
Q10.F: Leading a team that ships a big technology project on time
Q10.G: Building something creative that uses AI in a way no one has tried before
Q10.H: Making sure a whole system keeps running with zero failures

Q12.label: What you want to learn more about
Q12.A: How to build apps and write code that solves real problems
Q12.B: How AI systems learn from data and make decisions on their own
Q12.C: How to design websites and digital products that look and feel great
Q12.D: How data is collected, analyzed, and turned into useful insights
Q12.E: How hackers break into systems and how to stop them
Q12.F: How the internet and networks actually work behind the scenes
Q12.G: How to build and grow a business or brand online
Q12.H: How technology is managed and led inside large organizations

GuestGuard.title: Your results will be lost
GuestGuard.description:
You haven't saved your quiz results yet. If you leave this page, your recommended majors and all quiz answers will be gone forever.

Create a free account to keep your results and come back anytime.

university_detail.help_desc: Our counselors are ready to guide you through the process.
university_detail.tuition_notice: Fees are subject to change. Additional costs for books, uniforms, and administrative fees may apply. Contact the bursar office for the most current fee structure.
